ownedComment.body: Remove duplicate records before DB load
Wait for all loaders to complete
Remove duplicates after load (DB constraints)
Only New Files after last transfer
Bulk insert to DB Using COPY or prepared statements
Execute stored procedures for data transform ations
Triggered by Transfer Module or Scheduler Contains: flowId, paths, config
Create directories: - /raw/ (input XML files) - /result/ (parsed output) - /error/ (failed parses)
Load table metadata from repository
Pre-processing tasks (vendor-specific)
Default: 8 threads Configurable per flow
File patterns: - *_eNodeB_*.xml (4G PM) - *_gNodeB_*.xml (5G PM) - *_RNC_*.xml (3G PM) Example: 150 files
Generate metadata tables from DB schema
Extract metadata from filenam e: - fragm entDate - nodeName - fileId
SAX events: - startElement - characters - endElement
Output format: table_name-timestamp.csv
Cleanup resources Close file handles
executor.shutdown() await termination
Flush all CSV buffers Close file writers
Post-processing tasks (vendor-specific) - Aggregations - Validations
Store discovered metrics to m etadata tables
Run aggregation queries (hourly, daily KPIs)

node.name: Analyze CSV file N Extract min/max dates
Analyze CSV file 2 Extract min/max dates
Analyze CSV file 1 Extract min/max dates
Open XML file with SAX parser
Open XML file with SAX parser

properties.documentation: Run aggregation queries (hourly, daily KPIs)
Store discovered metrics to m etadata tables
Post-processing tasks (vendor-specific) - Aggregations - Validations
Flush all CSV buffers Close file writers
executor.shutdown() await termination
Cleanup resources Close file handles
Output format: table_name-timestamp.csv
SAX events: - startElement - characters - endElement
Extract metadata from filenam e: - fragm entDate - nodeName - fileId
Generate metadata tables from DB schema
File patterns: - *_eNodeB_*.xml (4G PM) - *_gNodeB_*.xml (5G PM) - *_RNC_*.xml (3G PM) Example: 150 files
Default: 8 threads Configurable per flow
Pre-processing tasks (vendor-specific)
Load table metadata from repository
Create directories: - /raw/ (input XML files) - /result/ (parsed output) - /error/ (failed parses)
Triggered by Transfer Module or Scheduler Contains: flowId, paths, config
Execute stored procedures for data transform ations
Bulk insert to DB Using COPY or prepared statements
Only New Files after last transfer
